title: Review the uncommitted changes. Context: # Coder Handoff ## Task Canon v3.1 スクリプト実装のコミット — canon-launch.sh改修 + coder/verifier/shipper新規 + SKILL.md更新をgit commitする ## Changed Files .gitignore assets/hooks/context-monitor.sh assets/scripts/canon-launch.sh assets/skills/agent-memory/experience.jsonl ass...
summary_text: 1. High: [canon-v3-shipper.sh#L78-L90](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-v3-shipper.sh#L78) only stages `git diff --name-only` and explicitly skips untracked files. In this worktree, `assets/scripts/canon-v3-coder.sh`, `assets/scripts/canon-v3-verifier.sh`, and `assets/scripts/canon-v3-shipper.sh` are untracked, so the auto-commit will omit the new workers entirely. [canon-launch.sh#L11-L18](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-launch.sh#L11) now hard-depends on those files, so a fresh checkout of the resulting commit will fail with `Missing worker ...`. 2. High: The v3.1 flow is not scoped to the current Canon task. [canon-v3-verifier.sh#L281-L315](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-v3-verifier.sh#L281) auto-runs verification for any dirty repo diff, [canon-v3-coder.sh#L58-L76](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-v3-coder.sh#L58) snapshots the whole repo diff into handoff, and [canon-v3-shipper.sh#L67-L95](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/scripts/canon-v3-shipper.sh#L67) stages every tracked modified file already in the worktree. In the current dirty tree, that means unrelated tracked changes can be reviewed and committed by the pipeline. Scores: correctness `4/10`, security `6/10`, code quality `5/10`. I only did static review plus `bash -n`; I did not run an end-to-end `cmux`/`codex`/`gh` flow. SCORE: 4/10
